about.title: About me
about.description: I am a developer with solid experience building scalable web applications using React, Vue, TypeScript, and Node.js. I have skills in designing and developing REST and GraphQL APIs, user authentication, managing relational and non-relational databases, and implementing CI/CD and deploying to the cloud (AWS and Vercel).
about.description_2: I have participated in fintech, education, and e-commerce projects, focusing on code quality, performance, security, and making business-oriented technical decisions.
